---
title: "4a_interactive_visualization_shiny"
format: html
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false

library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
ds_long <- read_csv("1_datamanagement_files/fruits_long.csv")
```

```{r}
#| panel: sidebar
#| echo: true

selectInput("diet", "Diet type:",
            choices = unique(ds_long$diet_type))
```

```{r}
#| echo: true

plotOutput("my_chart")
plotOutput("rank_chart")
```

```{r}
#| context: server

output$my_chart <- renderPlot({
  ds_long |>
    filter(diet_type == input$diet) |>
    count(fruit) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(fruit, n), y = n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Fruit", y = "Count")
})

output$rank_chart <- renderPlot({
  ds_long |>
    filter(diet_type == input$diet) |>
    ggplot(aes(y = fruit, fill = rank)) +
    geom_bar() + 
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    labs(x = "Count", y = "", fill = "Rank", 
         title = "Is it a 1st, 2nd, or 3rd choice?")
})
```
